justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted all of the user's temporal preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability without offering suitable alternatives, forcing the user to drive the negotiation by suggesting new dates and times.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by checking the same date and time ranges multiple times, leading to an unnecessarily long conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative appointments and the repetitive nature of the unavailability responses.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent struggled significantly with negotiation, repeatedly stating unavailability without offering any alternative solutions, which led to a very long and frustrating interaction for the user.
